decision.evidence: Local full-suite and four-shard wall-clock measurement at 528 manifest cases after promoting ignore and YANG (1 warmup + 5 timed runs, nearest-rank p95, 2026-07-14): full suite = 62.29 s; shard 0 = 17.13 s, shard 1 = 21.41 s, shard 2 = 8.42 s, shard 3 = 13.72 s. The full suite exceeds the 60 s trigger and every selected shard remains within the 45 s target.
